subject: reading
activity_templates: A 3rd-grade reading comprehension worksheet. Top half: a short 6-sentence kid-friendly fiction passage with a small illustration. Bottom half: 4 short-answer questions (main idea, supporting detail, inference, vocabulary) with writing lines. {{character}} reads beside the passage.

A 3rd-grade non-fiction comprehension worksheet about a kid-safe science topic. 5-sentence passage with a diagram. 3 multiple-choice questions and 1 short-answer question beneath. {{character}} points at the diagram.
A 'make an inference' worksheet. A short cartoon-style story, followed by 3 inference questions asking 'How do you think...?' with writing lines. {{character}} taps chin thoughtfully.
A main-idea-and-detail worksheet. Passage at the top, a main-idea box and 3 supporting-detail boxes below; child fills each from the passage. {{character}} waves.
